specializations: Specialty film formers for color cosmetics
product_highlights: Natrosol™ hydroxyethylcellulose (HEC) — versatile natural thickener and film former
Klucel™ hydroxypropylcellulose (HPC) — natural film former for hair care and cosmetics
Benecel™ HPMC — multifunctional texture modifier for skincare and hair care
Specialty film formers for long-wear and coating applications
notes: Ashland's personal care division offers a comprehensive range of texture-modifying polymers with a strong emphasis on cellulose-based natural solutions. Their Natrosol™ hydroxyethylcellulose, Klucel™ hydroxypropylcellulose, and Benecel™ HPMC are widely used as thickeners, film formers, and texture modifiers in skincare, hair care, and color cosmetics. Ashland's natural polymer range meets growing consumer demand for bio-based texture solutions without compromising on performance or formulation flexibility.
